text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
309 
SNP_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) Type 
DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the type of special needs plan (SNP) for applicable plan benefit packages. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
0 = Non-SNP 
C = Chronic or Disabling Condition 
D = Dual-Eligible 
I = Institutional 
Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs the plan
